title: Fry-Day Fun: National French Fries Day
story: Crispy, golden, and absolutely irresistible - French fries get their own special day every July 13! On National French Fries Day, restaurants across America offer special deals on their crispiest creations. Fast food chains post mouth-watering photos of their fries on social media, while fancy restaurants show off truffle fries and sweet potato varieties. People share pictures of their favorite fries online using hashtags like #NationalFrenchFriesDay. Some families even have fry-making contests at home, trying different cuts and seasonings. Whether you like them thin and crispy, thick and fluffy, or loaded with cheese and bacon, this tasty holiday celebrates America's favorite side dish in the most delicious way possible!
activity_question: What do restaurants often do on National French Fries Day?
activity_choices: Offer special deals on fries
Give away free hamburgers
Close early for the day
Only serve sweet potato fries
bonus_fact: Americans eat about 4.5 billion pounds of French fries every year!

title: Geek Out and Be Proud Day!
story: Every July 13, people around the world celebrate Embrace Your Geekness Day by showing off their biggest passions without any shame! Whether you're obsessed with comic books, video games, science experiments, or collecting vintage stamps, this is your day to let your geek flag fly high. People wear their favorite superhero t-shirts, share photos of their collections online, and talk endlessly about the things they love most. Some organize trivia contests about their favorite movies or TV shows, while others spend hours building with LEGOs or coding new programs. The best part? Everyone gets to discover that being a geek is actually pretty awesome!
activity_question: What do people do on Embrace Your Geekness Day?
activity_choices: Hide their hobbies from everyone
Show off their biggest passions proudly
Only read serious books
Avoid talking about their interests
activity_answer: Show off their biggest passions proudly
follow_up_question: What would you geek out about if you celebrated this day?

title: Beans and Franks Get Their Fame Day
story: Hot dogs and baked beans team up for their own special day on July 13! This classic American combo gets celebrated across the country as families fire up their grills and break out the bean pots. People love this simple, tasty meal because it's perfect for summer cookouts, camping trips, and backyard parties. Some folks make it fancy with gourmet sausages and homemade beans, while others keep it simple with canned beans and regular hot dogs. Either way works perfectly fine!
activity_question: What makes beans and franks perfect for summer celebrations?
activity_choices: They're great for cookouts and backyard parties
They only taste good when it's hot outside
They were invented during summer months
They help people stay cool in the heat
activity_answer: They're great for cookouts and backyard parties
bonus_fact: Some people add maple syrup or brown sugar to make their beans extra sweet!

title: Fool's Paradise Day: Dream Big and Silly!
story: Every July 13, people celebrate Fool's Paradise Day by letting their wildest dreams run free! This quirky holiday encourages everyone to imagine impossible things and share their silliest wishes. Kids might dream about having a pet dragon or living in a candy castle, while adults fantasize about never doing laundry again. People post their funny daydreams on social media, write in dream journals, or just spend time thinking about their perfect imaginary world. Some families even have "dream parties" where everyone shares their most ridiculous ideas without anyone saying they're impossible. It's a day to be wonderfully foolish and embrace pure imagination!
activity_question: What do people often do on Fool's Paradise Day?
activity_choices: Share their wildest dreams and silly wishes
Play pranks on their friends
Eat only dessert for every meal
Wear their clothes backwards all day
activity_answer: Share their wildest dreams and silly wishes
follow_up_question: What would your perfect fool's paradise look like?

title: Gruntled Workers Day: Happy Employees Unite!
story: Workers everywhere celebrate being totally gruntled on July 13! This silly holiday flips the word "disgruntled" on its head, encouraging people to feel happy and satisfied at work. Employees share funny memes about loving their jobs, bosses bring treats to the office, and coworkers post cheerful messages about teamwork. It's a day to appreciate good workplace vibes and remember that being gruntled beats being gruntled any day!
activity_question: What does it mean to be "gruntled" on this holiday?
activity_choices: To be happy and satisfied at work
To make grunting sounds all day
To complain about your boss
To wear grunt-themed costumes
activity_answer: To be happy and satisfied at work
follow_up_question: What would make you feel most gruntled at school or during activities?
